description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Recruit 1 Character with any potential reaching Red
description.schinese: 【征服之路】招募1个任意潜力值达到红色的角色
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】招募1個任意潛力值達到紅色的角色

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Recruit 1 Character with all four Mastery directions reaching Red
description.schinese: 【征服之路】招募1个四个专精方向都达到红色的角色
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】招募1個四個專精方向都達到紅色的角色

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Own 1 Character with all four Mastery directions reaching the highest Mastery level
description.schinese: 【征服之路】拥有1个四个专精方向都达到最高专精等级的角色
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】擁有1個四個專精方向都達到最高專精等級的角色

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" One Team's damage contribution reaches 90% in a battle
description.schinese: 【征服之路】在一场战斗中，某个队伍的伤害贡献达到全队的90%
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】在一場戰鬥中，某個隊伍的傷害貢獻達到全隊的90%

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Capture all Cities without losing any location
description.schinese: 【征服之路】在不失去任何一个地点的情况下，占领所有城市
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】在不失去任何一個地點的情況下，佔領所有城市

description.schinese: 【征服之路】占领5个城市
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】佔領5個城市

description.schinese: 【征服之路】占领20个城市
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】佔領20個城市

description.schinese: 【征服之路】占领所有城市
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】佔領所有城市

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Initiate a Siege against a family not at war with you
description.schinese: 【征服之路】向一个未与你处于交战状态下的家族发起攻城
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】向一個未與你處於交戰狀態下的家族發起攻城

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Be at war with 5 families simultaneously
description.schinese: 【征服之路】同时与5个家族交战
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】同時與5個家族交戰

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Be at war with 12 families simultaneously
description.schinese: 【征服之路】同时与12个家族交战
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】同時與12個家族交戰

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Unlock the second Active Skill
description.schinese: 【征服之路】解锁第二个主动技能
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】解鎖第二個主動技能

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Unlock the third Active Skill
description.schinese: 【征服之路】解锁第三个主动技能
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】解鎖第三個主動技能

description.schinese: 【征服之路】解锁15个兵种线
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】解鎖15個兵種線

description.schinese: 【征服之路】解锁30个兵种线
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】解鎖30個兵種線

description.schinese: 【征服之路】解锁全部兵种线
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】解鎖全部兵種線

description.schinese: 【征服之路】任意1种士兵练度达到100%
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】任意1種士兵練度達到100%

description.tchinese: 【征服之路】任意5種士兵練度達到100%

description.schinese: 【征服之路】与任意角色结缘
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】與任意角色結緣

description.english: "Conqueror's Path" Have 4 pairs of married Characters in your family
description.schinese: 【征服之路】家族中有4对结缘的角色
description.tchinese: 【征服之路】家族中有4對結緣的角色
